Uses of Record Class
io.bloviate.db.Database

Packages that use Database
Package
Description
io.bloviate.db
 
io.bloviate.ext
 
io.bloviate.util
 

  • Uses of Database in io.bloviate.db

    Constructors in io.bloviate.db with parameters of type Database
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Builder(Connection connection, Database database, DatabaseConfiguration databaseConfiguration)
    Creates a builder for a filler bound to the given connection, database metadata, and configuration.
     
    TableFiller(Connection connection, Database database, DatabaseConfiguration databaseConfiguration, Table table, CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Constructs a new TableFiller with an explicit CommitStrategy override.

  • Uses of Database in io.bloviate.ext

    Methods in io.bloviate.ext with parameters of type Database
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default BulkLoadHandle
    DatabaseSupport.disableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database)
    Disables foreign-key (and, where applicable, unique) enforcement for the duration of a bulk load, on the given connection's session.
    BulkLoadHandle
    MySQLSupport.disableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database)
    Disables FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS and UNIQUE_CHECKS for the session.
    BulkLoadHandle
    PostgresSupport.disableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database)
    Sets session_replication_role = replica on the connection, which stops user and foreign-key triggers (including referential-integrity checks) from firing for the session.
    default void
    DatabaseSupport.enableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database, BulkLoadHandle handle)
    Re-enables what DatabaseSupport.disableConstraints(Connection, Database) turned off, on the same connection.
    void
    MySQLSupport.enableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database, BulkLoadHandle handle)
    Restores UNIQUE_CHECKS and FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS to 1 for the session before the connection is returned to the pool.
    void
    PostgresSupport.enableConstraints(Connection connection, Database database, BulkLoadHandle handle)
    Restores session_replication_role = origin, re-enabling trigger and foreign-key firing for the session before the connection is returned to the pool.

  • Uses of Database in io.bloviate.util

    Methods in io.bloviate.util that return Database
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Database
    DatabaseUtils.getMetadata(Connection connection)
    Extracts complete database metadata from a Connection.
    static Database
    DatabaseUtils.getMetadata(DataSource dataSource)
    Extracts complete database metadata from a DataSource.
    Methods in io.bloviate.util with parameters of type Database
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Column
    DatabaseUtils.getAssociatedPrimaryKeyColumn(Database database, Table table, Column column)
    Traverses foreign key relationships to find the root primary key column.
